title: ReadCapacityDedicatedConfig
description: Configuration for dedicated read capacity. See  [this guide](https://docs.pinecone.io/guides/index-data/dedicated-read-nodes) for more details on  how to configure dedicated read capacity.

node_type.description: The type of machines to use. Available options: `b1` and `t1`. `t1` includes increased processing power and memory.

scaling.description: The type of scaling strategy to use.
